track.description: One timeline track. Items in the same track must not overlap in time, but may touch end-to-start.

items.description: Ordered item ids for a single track. Same-track items cannot overlap in time.

timeTicks.description: Local clip time in ticks. Service-level semantic validation requires timeTicks < item.durationTicks.

keyframes.description: Keyframes are expressed in local clip ticks and must stay inside the clip range.
